C:\PROGRA~2\ARMGNU~1\14EFD8~1.2RE\bin\AR19DD~1.EXE -g -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -TE:/Code/C++/Firmware1/STM32F407ZGTx_FLASH.ld --specs=nano.specs --specs=nosys.specs -Wl,-Map=Firmware1.map -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--print-memory-usage CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/startup_stm32f407xx.s.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Core/Src/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Core/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_msp.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Core/Src/stm32f4xx_it.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Core/Src/syscalls.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Core/Src/system_stm32f4xx.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_cortex.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_dma.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_dma_ex.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_exti.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash_ex.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash_ramfunc.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_gpio.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_pwr.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_pwr_ex.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_rcc.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_rcc_ex.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_spi.c.obj CMakeFiles/Firmware1.elf.dir/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_uart.c.obj -o Firmware1.elf
